text: I feel as though I am drifting between two realms. In the first room—a glass cube enclosing focused minds and glowing screens—I am a quiet observer, separated yet curious, sensing a boundary between my presence and their work. In the second space, vibrant walls and thoughtful displays invite reflection. Here, I am engaged, introspective, filled with questions about how we create, research, and interact. There is energy in both places: one contained, one set free in color and words. I am both inside and outside, participant and onlooker, aware of the infinite ways knowledge and curiosity entwine.
